name: io.github.threadctx-dev/threadctx-mcp
description: Shared memory MCP server for AI coding agents — local by default, team-shared via threadctx.dev.

environmentVariables.description: 'local' (default, free, no signup) or 'cloud' (shared team memory)
environmentVariables.name: THREADCTX_MODE

environmentVariables.description: API key for cloud mode, issued at threadctx.dev. Not needed in local mode.
environmentVariables.name: THREADCTX_API_KEY
